name: nav-unblocker
description: Bypass navigation database activation check - uses DrGER2's improved manage_cd.sh patch method (Keldo's discovery)
author: dspl1236
scripts: nav_unblocker.sh - Apply navdb activation bypass patch
nav_restore.sh - Remove patch, restore factory activation
nav_status.sh - Check patch state and nav database status
notes: Appends Keldo's vdev-logvolmgr termination command to manage_cd.sh (DrGER2 method). Works on both MMI3G High and 3G+ without needing sed binary. Persistent across reboots. Overwritten by efs-system firmware reinstall. Detects and coexists with legacy Keldo/Vlasoff/DarkDll activator scripts.
